name: Head Restoration
description: Restores Agent 47's head from HITMAN (2016) and HITMAN 2 (2018) and Alpha build (2015).

options.tooltip:
Using shader from HITMAN 2, resulting in a look similar to HITMAN (2016).

[Season 1] were shown in the preview.

options.name: 2016 (Eyes Variant)
options.tooltip:
Using shader from HITMAN 2, resulting in a look similar to HITMAN (2016).

[Season 1] were shown in the preview.

options.name: H3 2016
options.tooltip:
Using shader from HITMAN 3, resulting in a more advanced look.

[Season 1+] were shown in the preview.

options.name: H3 2016 (Eyes Variant)
options.tooltip:
Using shader from HITMAN 3, resulting in a more advanced look.

[Season 1+] were shown in the preview.

Using shader from HITMAN 2, Fully restores HITMAN 2 head from left over files.

[Season 2] were shown in the preview.

options.name: H3 2018
options.tooltip: Using shader from HITMAN 3, resulting in a more advanced look.

options.name: H2 2015

Using shader from HITMAN 2, resulting in a reduced highlighted look.
